test-code.description: transpose x and null, still bad
test for null on unrelated object is ok
[java] SimplifyConditional can not detect the case if(foo != null && (foo instanceof Bar)) #2541
[java] SimplifyConditional: False negative when null check and instanceof are separated by other && conditions #6513
[java] SimplifyConditional: False negative with || chain #6513 variant
[java] SimplifyConditional: Should not report when null check is for different variable
